{{CargoRelic
|name=Embossed Spring Couplets
|class_id=20537
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Crafted by the R&D team for the Lunar New Year, this specially designed pair of spring couplets showcases intricate patterns using a gold-foiling technique. The words on it are penned by a renowned calligrapher, not only making it valuable but also highly visually appealing.
|fame=13
|art=15
|fth=16
|civ=31
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per 20 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail ATK +4<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 300/300
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per 20 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail ATK +8<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 300/300
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per 20 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail ATK +12<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 300/300
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per 20 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail ATK +12<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 300/300
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per 20 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail ATK +12<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 300/300<br> (Awakened)
}}
